excerpt: Renterra’s Contract eSignature tools let you create and send rental agreements in just a few clicks—no printing, scanning, or chasing signatures. Customers can sign from their phone, tablet, or computer with no login required, and completed documents are automatically saved to the order.
Rental eSign + Pay offers rental businesses an affordable, simple solution to customers looking for contactless, paperless signature + payment processes.
Adopt Mobile Workflows – Capture photos, secure e-signatures, and manage rentals anywhere.
